message:
refactor: Convert *_mod.zig files to comptime genConst pattern

Batch convert native module codegen files from runtime genConst helper
pattern to comptime function generator pattern. This eliminates separate
wrapper functions and consolidates constant generation inline.

Pattern change:
- Old: fn genConst(self, args, v) { try self.emit(v); }
       fn genUnit(self, args) { try genConst(self, args, "{}"); }
- New: fn genConst(comptime v) ModuleHandler { return struct { ... }.f; }
       .{ "func", genConst("{}") }

Files converted in this batch:
- errno_mod.zig, faulthandler_mod.zig, gc_mod.zig, atexit_mod.zig
- copyreg_mod.zig, contextvars_mod.zig, warnings_mod.zig, abc_mod.zig
- codeop_mod.zig, marshal_mod.zig, signal_mod.zig, locale_mod.zig
- fcntl_mod.zig, select_mod.zig, site_mod.zig, types_mod.zig
- typing_mod.zig, csv_mod.zig, difflib_mod.zig, string_mod.zig

Reduces total *_mod.zig lines from ~10,238 to 10,172 (-66 lines).
Still ~189 files remaining with old pattern.
